title: Caesar Cipher Part 2: Encoding
body: Practice encoding Caesar ciphers manually. Try shifting letters through the alphabet the opposite way until you get a meaningful word.
lesson: CRYPTO-D1A-9f5a2f70, CRYPTO-D1B-55c1a1de, CRYPTO-D4A-8b7f12c9, CRYPTO-D4B-74ad0c21, CRYPTO-D5A-90c3e4e2, CRYPTO-D5B-1f0a76bd
